name: Sparkles
description: An animated sparkle/twinkle effect that renders particles around content using a TSParticles-based engine, creating a magical glittering look.
whenToUse: Use for highlighting important text, headings, CTAs, or any element that needs a magical sparkle/glitter effect.

props.name: children
props.description: Content to render with sparkles around it

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes for the sparkles container

props.name: id
props.description: Unique ID for the particles instance

props.name: background
props.description: Background color of the particles container
